caption: A presentation slide titled "MOJITO: Multi-site OPS-5G Joint Independent Test Option" is displayed, featuring a diagram labeled "Connecting DoD 5G and OPS-5G." The diagram shows a flow of interactions between "OARPA" and "OPS-5G secure open source software and fast software development," a "GOV Team" utilizing "OPS-5G ITE," "The Linux Foundation" providing a "secure 5G stack," and another "GOV Team" responsible for "MOJITO design, procurement, coordination and management." An inset map of the United States indicates "MOJITO: 5G Core Security:" and notes "A subset of sites in the DoD 5G-to-5G Testbed and OPS-5G ITE sites." A small inset video in the top right corner shows a man with short hair and a dark shirt speaking. The footer contains logos for "#opennetledge," "THE LINUX FOUNDATION," "LF NETWORKING," and "LF EDGE," along with "DISTRIBUTION STATEMENT A. Approved for public release; distribution unlimited." The scene remains static across the frames, with only minor changes in the man's facial expressions.
